waffle-cones.name: Waffle Cones
instructions: Scrape vanilla bean seeds into a small saucepan over medium heat; add butter and cook until melted, 2 to 3 minutes. Whisk vanilla butter, brown sugar, egg whites, vanilla extract, and salt together in a bowl; add flour and beat until batter is smooth.
Preheat a waffle cone maker according to manufacturer's instructions.
Pour batter into the preheated waffle maker and cook according to instructions.
Immediately wrap around a cone-shaped dowel or press into a bowl-shaped mold. Let each cone or bowl cool for a few minutes. Store in an airtight container for up to 2 days.

wake-county-cooler.name: Wake County Cooler
instructions: Combine vodka and tea in a large pitcher.
Let sit at room temperature, stirring occasionally, 2 hours.
Strain into another large pitcher.
Combine sugar and ¼ cup water in a jar, cover, and shake until sugar is dissolved; mix into vodka.
For each cooler, fill a Collins glass with ice.
Add lemon juice and 2 oz. infused vodka.
Top with club soda and garnish with a lemon wedge and a mint sprig.

whiskey-sidecar.name: Whiskey Sidecar

ingredients.item: Fluid ounce freshly squeezed lemon juice

instructions: Place sugar in a shallow bowl. Run a lemon wedge around the rim of a cocktail glass; dip the rim into sugar.
Combine whiskey, orange liqueur, and lemon juice in a cocktail shaker; add ice. Cover and shake until the outside of the shaker has frosted, about 20 seconds. Strain into the prepared cocktail glass.

white-and-dark-chocolate-brownie-recipe-.original_name: Receta de brownie de chocolate blanco y negro
instructions: Agrega el chocolate negro partido y 80 gr de mantequilla en un bol apto para microondas. Derrite durante 1 minuto.
Remove and remove the mixture with a pallet or Silicone spatula. The chocolate should be completely melted.

Now mix the black chocolate and butter together with the rest of the egg and sugar mix and remove everything until the looks are consistent.
Cover the mold you will use with vegetable or oven paper. You can also anoint his walls and base with some butter.
Vierte ambas mezclas en el orden que quieras. Con la ayuda de un palillo de madera has una especie de baile para que quede marmoleado.
Hornea de 30 a 35 minutos.

white-chocolate-flan-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta fácil de flan de chocolate blanco

white-soup-lezzet.name: White Soup
instructions: 1. Wash and drain with plenty of water.
2. Take a large pot and pour half an hour by adding 4 cups of water and a pinch salt.
3. For the finishing of the soup while the rice is boiled, take the flour with the egg before a bowl, then add the yogurt and cook well.
4. Add the mixture to 2 tablespoons of water inceltip azar soup.
5. Cook for 15 minutes in jealous fire by stirring constantly.
6. Add rubbish and tarh in the pan.
7. Add to the soup and cook for 1-2 minutes.
8. Take the soup to the serving bowls.
9. Add fresh drawn pepper and decorate it with reindeed carrot, warm service.

whole-grain-waffles.name: Whole Grain Waffles
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs, milk, oil, applesauce, and vanilla. Beat in whole wheat pastry flour, flax seed meal, wheat germ, all-purpose flour, baking powder, sugar, and salt until batter is smooth.
Preheat a waffle iron, and coat with cooking spray. Pour batter into waffle iron in batches, and cook until crisp and golden brown.

whole-wheat-pancakes-from-scratch.name: Whole Wheat Pancakes From Scratch
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Spread wheat germ over a baking sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven until toasted, about 5 minutes. Cool slightly, then transfer wheat germ to a large bowl.
Stir flour, baking soda, and salt into wheat germ. Beat buttermilk, eggs, and oil in another bowl until smooth; pour egg mixture into flour mixture and stir until batter is just blended.

Heat griddle over medium-high heat and coat with cooking spray. Pour 1/4 cup portions of batter onto the griddle and cook until bubbles form and the edges are dry, about 2 minutes. Flip and cook until browned on the other side, about 3 minutes more. Repeat with remaining batter.

winter-slaw-with-red-pears-and-pumpkin-s.name: Winter Slaw With Red Pears And Pumpkin Seeds

ingredients.item: Fresh blood orange or regular orange juice

ingredients.prep: cut into quarters, cored, thinly sliced
trimmed, peeled, thinly shaved on a mandoline

instructions: Whisk orange juice, oil, vinegar, and mustard in a small bowl to combine. Season dressing with salt and pepper.

Trim brussels sprouts and halve lengthwise. Remove larger leaves; place in a large bowl. Very thinly slice remaining cores; place in bowl with leaves. Add half of dressing and toss to coat; season with salt and pepper. Massage brussels sprouts gently to soften slightly. Add pears, beets, radicchio, and remaining dressing and toss well; season with salt and pepper. Serve slaw topped with pumpkin seeds.
